network_summary: All four locations are confirmed Dental Dreams offices operated under KOS Services LLC, a documented DSO management company (MSO) that is the administrative backbone of the Dental Dreams branded DSO. Phil Kural is an authorized official across all four NPPES records. The entire cluster is a Dental Dreams / KOS Services branded-DSO network. KOS Services LLC was founded in 2001, runs 77+ dental clinics across 11 states, and is headquartered in Chicago, IL 60654. No private-equity sponsor has been publicly documented for KOS Services / Dental Dreams; the company appears to be founder-operated (Dr. Sameera Hussain / Khurram Hussain family). pe_backed=false.
owner_operator_identity: KOS Services LLC (MSO/management company); Dental Dreams (brand); Dr. Sameera Hussain (founder); Khurram Hussain (CEO); Phil Kural listed as NPPES Authorized Official across all four locations
durable_artifacts: KOS Services LLC named as parent_company on EIN 200901668 (North Riverside) and EIN 200901797 (Damen Ave Chicago)
All 4 addresses confirmed on dentaldreams.com official locator (see evidence_urls)
Indeed employer profile lists 'KOS Services, LLC - Dental Dreams - Chicago, IL' as single employer entity
mso_platform_pe_evidence: KOS Services LLC is the documented MSO/management company behind the Dental Dreams DSO brand. Source: https://www.indeed.com/cmp/Kos-Services,-LLC---Dental-Dreams---Chicago,-Il and https://www.dentaldreams.com/careers/ (careers listed under KOS Services). KOS Services manages 77+ dental clinics across 11 states. No private-equity sponsor has been publicly documented.
evidence_chain: AO signal: PHIL KURAL appears as NPPES Authorized Official on 4 distinct GP locations across 4 Chicagoland ZIPs (60506, 60546, 60609, 60632). Two locations carry parent_company='KOS SERVICES' and affiliated_dso='KOS SERVICES' in NPPES data. Documentary corroboration: (1) dentaldreams.com official location finder lists all 4 addresses — 'Premier Dental Clinic - N Lake St, Aurora' (https://www.dentaldreams.com/location/premier-dental-clinic-n-lake-st-aurora/), 'Premier Dental Clinic - West 25th St, North Riverside' (https://www.dentaldreams.com/location/premier-dental-clinic-west-25th-st-north-riverside/), 'Studio Dental - South Damen Ave, Chicago' (https://www.dentaldreams.com/location/studio-dental-south-damen-ave-chicago/), 'Studio Dental - South Pulaski Rd, Chicago' (https://www.dentaldreams.com/location/studio-dental-south-pulaski-rd-chicago/). (2) KOS Services LLC is publicly documented as the management/MSO entity for Dental Dreams (Indeed, Handshake, Built In Chicago). (3) Dental Dreams was founded in Aurora, IL in 2001 and now operates 77+ clinics in 11 states. Verdict: branded_dso, pe_backed=false (no PE sponsor found).
future_app_notes: These 4 locations should all be classified dso_national with affiliated_dso='Dental Dreams' and parent_company='KOS Services LLC'. The Aurora location (60506) currently has entity_classification='large_group' and no affiliated_dso — it should be promoted to dso_national. The 60632 location already has affiliated_dso='Dental Dreams'. The 60546 and 60609 locations have affiliated_dso='KOS SERVICES' — update affiliated_dso label to 'Dental Dreams (KOS Services)' for consistency. EINs 200901668 and 200901797 are both KOS Services EINs and can anchor future cluster detection.
